form.formComment: Strong performance to win by 3 lengths at this track over 320m (18.72) beating Silvertree Adam in Maiden on April 10. Looks the one to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance to win by 3 lengths at this track over 320m (18.72) beating Silvertree Adam in Maiden on April 10. Looks the one to beat.

form.formComment: Is back up to 400m which has been an issue in the past. Last appeared when fifth over 320m at this track five weeks ago. Capable of taking this out.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Is back up to 400m which has been an issue in the past. Last appeared when fifth over 320m at this track five weeks ago. Capable of taking this out.

form.formComment: Last start finished sixth on March 27 over 400m at this track behind Shifty Bulldozer, beaten 17 lengths (24.12) in a Grade 5. Look for improvement. Not out of it.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished sixth on March 27 over 400m at this track behind Shifty Bulldozer, beaten 17 lengths (24.12) in a Grade 5. Look for improvement. Not out of it.

form.formComment: Improved sharply when third behind Paw Hart at Temora last start over 330m (19.18). Has to be included.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Improved sharply when third behind Paw Hart at Temora last start over 330m (19.18). Has to be included.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Was slow to begin and was hampered in the run to the 1st turn.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors at big odds last time when third (18.84) at this track, making it two placings on end. Will need a little luck early from the draw. Others preferred.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished in the minors at big odds last time when third (18.84) at this track, making it two placings on end. Will need a little luck early from the draw. Others preferred.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Made contact with the running rail entering the turn out of the back straight.

form.formComment: Could only manage fifth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest at double-figure odds when second (19.03) over 330m at Temora. Drawn out wide and needs to find best form to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Could only manage fifth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest at double-figure odds when second (19.03) over 330m at Temora. Drawn out wide and needs to find best form to feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hampered on the turn into the home straight and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Lines up from box 7 for the first time after finishing a 12 length seventh at this track (23.73) in a Grade 5. Can hit the frame with the right run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Lines up from box 7 for the first time after finishing a 12 length seventh at this track (23.73) in a Grade 5. Can hit the frame with the right run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels in the back straight and lost momentum.
Rounding the first turn, was checked, losing momentum.

form.formComment: Last start finished 4th over 330m at Temora beaten 11 lengths (19.69) behind Destiny Our Girl in a Grade 5 on April 15. Forward showing expected.
